candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid Expenses and Other Current Assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Current asset component/subtotal, not the total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line, not a reported current asset total.
Non-current assets total, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS AT THE END OF THE PERIOD
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash; useful cross-check but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash, not the balance-sheet amount for year-end CHE.

candidates.row_label: Translation differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, not the cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents in disposal groups held for sale
candidates.why: Special component, not total cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities.
Only a component/subgroup of current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities total, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Appears to be current borrowing/loan balance and excludes lease wording; best clean current debt component on the balance sheet.
Supplemental current maturities of long-term debt; relevant for STD, but appears supplemental rather than the main current balance sheet line.
Potential short-term debt, but values are blank in preview and existence as a reported amount is unclear.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current borrowing line and excluded lease liabilities per rule. Did not include 'Interest-bearing current liabilities' because it includes 'Finance lease liabilities' and likely other non-baseline items. Did not add 'LT Debt Mat Within 1 Year' to avoid potential double counting with reported current borrowing disclosures.

candidates.why: Direct match for current tax liabilities / taxes payable.
Also a strong taxes payable label and may be used in some years as an alternative wording.

variables.notes: Provided both tax-payable phrasings as a priority list because labels vary across years.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for property, plant and equipment; a direct PPE-type label outside the shortlist.
Only leased PPE subset, not total PPE.
Only leased PPE subset, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets, Gross
candidates.why: ROU assets are lease-related and not baseline total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets, Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset/accumulated depreciation, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow capex, not the balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected a semantically correct balance-sheet PPE label outside the shortlist. It is the closest reported equivalent to total/net property, plant and equipment.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: CASH FLOW FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES Investing activities
candidates.why: This is the operating cash flow total line; the trailing words appear to be a formatting spillover into the next section header.

final_choice.row_label: CASH FLOW FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES Investing activities

variables.notes: Used the exact operating cash flow total label as written in column A.
